creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
As the maintainer of most lang/gcc ports I am in favor of this change and 
in fact, the list of compilers should remove 32, 33, 40, and 41, too, and
you may want to add 44 and 45.

If you do not have time to do so yourself, I'd be happy to commit such a
patch which would be a variation of Ulrich's on your behalf.

Gerald
